title: Fireworks
writer: Jürg Amstein, Erik Charell, Felix Lützkendorf
actors: Lilli Palmer, Karl Schönböck, Romy Schneider
plot: In 1908 a traveling circus arrives in a small German town. The circus director, known as Sascha Obolski, is really Alexander Oberholzer, the brother of local garden gnome maker Albert Oberholzer.
